text: Defined the evaluation plan in the Design phase (not retroactively)
Collected baseline performance data before training launched
Administered Level 1 reaction survey immediately after training
Reviewed Level 1 results and flagged items with low satisfaction scores
Collected and analyzed Level 2 (learning) pre/post assessment results
Administered Level 3 (behavior) follow-up survey or observation at 30, 60, or 90 days
Analyzed Level 3 results and identified where transfer is or isn't happening
Collected Level 4 business results data tied to the original performance gap
Identified root causes for any transfer gaps (environment, manager support, content)
Compiled findings into an evaluation report or executive summary
Presented findings and recommendations to the project sponsor
Planned and scheduled course revisions based on evaluation findings
